review_text:
Great caravan park, great friendly team just willing to help and chat.
Great location.
Our cabin was perfect, warm and comfortable.
And the pool was heated. 🌟
Definitely will return to here.
Best cabin i have ever been in, couldn’t be happier
Great park and very close to everything.
Caravan sites. Was a nice park. Quiet at night and could not here road noise. Bathrooms clean at all times.

We stayed 3 nights on a powered site. Booking process was seamless and staff communication was friendly and efficient. We loved the tree-filled site with lots of birds and great facilities. Very clean toilet and shower block. Visiting coffee van was a nice bonus. I enjoyed relaxing on the sun lounges around the crystal-clean heated swimming pool. The friendly staff at reception told us about a great cycle path nearby with beautiful paths around the Serpentine River which we also enjoyed. Nice quiet location a a short drive away from busy Mandurah but close enough to visit family and access cafes and restaurants on the foreshore. Thanks for a great stay and making a memorable first impression. We enjoyed our visit and will definitely be back. Thank you.

Great spot for families or couples.  Sms messages sent to let you know what's on.
Great service.
Great park to stay at. Amenities always clean. Staff friendly and helpful. Park is kept tidy and workers do a great job. Definitely recommend this park.

We very much felt right at home, our stay was easy going, relaxing the coffee van in the morning, and the food truck of a night on certain nights, was very practical.
🙂👍 we will be back
And we wish our stay was longer 😎👍
Very nice surroundings, very nice ambience,wildlife was excellent and well behaved albeit hungry, amenities very clean and nice big sites and friendly staff

We had a wonderful stay
This caravan park is one of the BEST ever 😃
Pool area was like a resort ⛵
Everything immaculate
Park looked after with love and care 😘❤️
We will be back !

Very nice stay while passing through for a few days whilst on my travels. Good location close to town. The park is very well kept and looked after with amenities being very clean which was pleasant! So well done to management and the team who looked after this park 👍 Thanks for the stay.

Well maintained park. Friendly and helpful staff. Pet and children friendly, activitues for children during school holidays. Food truck visits park every Saturday night. Coffee van Saturday morning (maybe Sunday as well)
Great park. Friendly staff. Very clean throughout. Has a great vibe. Lovely pool and surrounds.
We had a large concrete site that was a bonus in the wet weather. Staff were friendly and very helpful.  The young ground attendants worked non-stop to keep the place clean & tidy.

This location is worth a visit! Groundsman helps save marriages by assisting in guiding caravans into their spot! Staff are super friendly and assist where they can! Heated pool and slide was a win with our daughter. Plenty of space to explore and let the kids burn of steam. The staff go above and beyond in organising kid friendly entertainment and easy food options for long weekends/school holidays. Nice and close to plenty of attractions (Hotham train was a good morning out!).
Our only down side was the showers, need better shower heads on them to make showing easier (but a tiny problem in the grand scheme of things!)
We look forward to coming back!

We were so grateful that they found a very last minute spot for us! The amenities were clean and there was everything we needed. It was lovely to see so many families with kids enjoying the long weekend.
Absolutely loved it here and would definitely recommend….site is very well maintained….the staff were brilliant and very friendly

Great facilities. New pool was excellent. We had a great site for our caravan. Plenty of space with double concrete slab. Right next to amenities. The park was well maintained and was right across the road from the beach. There was a cafe in walking distance and the Dolphin Discovery centre was. Short walk away. Highly recommend.

Great park, we stayed in a powered site.
The staff were so friendly and very helpful. Very clean amenities and a great camp kitchen. Would definitely recommend staying here.
The  park is on Pinjarra road and easily able to transit to many and varied shopping locations. No road noise and quiet location. Decent sized sites and reasonable ensuites-Dog friendly
Excellent experience for everyone involved. Thankyou so very much.|Kind regards, Chris, Cathy, Ted, chlorane, Terry and Lorraine
Excellent staff help with positioning van on site and help with unhitching vehicle. Pleasant and helpful check in staff ☺️

Due to going on a caravanning holiday, we didnt require any rooms only caravan sites.b My friends and I had a magical experience and were very content with the ammeities that we had on offer. We feel extremely refreshed and look forward to booking our next journey at your tourist destination. Thankyou to all the friendly staff who greeted us all with happy smiles and friendiness everyday. Your focus on your clients and teamwork was impeccable.
Thankyou Chris, Cathy, Ted, Chloranne, Terry and Lorraine.

Really enjoyed our stay and had all the amenities required for tenting. Toilet block very clean, showers better than at my home. Kitchen was brilliant with fridges, toaster, microwave and kettle. Play area for the kids. Only downside was close to the main road, so at 4am woken to the noise of trucks.
Staff were very friendly and helpful and made our stay feel like we were welcomed. Would definitely go back again.
Lovely caravan park.  Enjoyed our stay.
Mandurah Caravan and Tourist park is our go to park. Great park , great staff, great amenities. See you soon. Cheers
Nice concrete patches with all amenities. Bus stop in front of premises. Nice bbq hut.
We had such a great time, will definitely be back x
The park is relatively small but well laid out. The roads are narrow so it takes some manoeuvring to get on site but the staff are willing to guide you in.
We had a great stay, used the powered tent sites they were close to the playground and unisex toilets. The children’s playground is gated and well taken care of.

We had a great stay at Mandurah caravan and tourist park!
We stayed in a cabin, amenities were clean and well stocked. Kids had a blast using the playground and pool area.

Nice place for the family staying and good arranged kids fun time during this Easter holiday, jumping pillow and swimming pool slide down let kids had a good memories, Easter bunny and found out  chocolate activity runs very well👍
One thing only dislike, all between caravan suits and camping suits are very tight, too closed each others.

Awesome park with great amenities. Staff are amazing always happy to help.
Over the Easter weekend there is always something going on and then topped off with a Easter egg hunt for all xx

What a beautiful park !!   Stayed over Easter in the caravan and this is a hidden gem. Very well looked after and maintained park. Huge pitches in excellent condition, each with their own bin. Grounds and gardens are beautiful .
We had our own caravan, the stay was better than last time as parents seemed more responsive to the texts about no riding after dark. It was more peaceful.

Nice clean and tidy caravan park. We stayed for the weekend, when we arrived there was torrential rain I was glad of the help to park the caravan from the caretaker made it so much easier. Bins for every site is a great touch. Toilets/showers and all facility’s were very clean. Kids loved riding around the park on there bikes! Heated pool and water slide were great even on a rainy weekend! We have booked to return again this Christmas as we were so impressed!

Be careful of the fb autumn deal as turns out they have a better deal as you purchase a voucher on their website and you get late 5pm checkout. Paid the extra $30 for late check out this time but you live and you learn. Next time I will be booking with the voucher, looking forward to it. I think the kids park could be opened a little earlier and stay open a littler later as 9am felt abit late and 6pm was abit early haha, still had a great time though.Oh and come prepared with mozzy spray!
Great , friendly Park great for kids, and great amenities
Excellent park staff and amenities. The staff all go out of their way to make sure your stay is great.
Very well maintained caravan park and sites, staff are very friendly and were helpful in organising our extra night stay.
Very professional and considerate of all the park patrons needs
Great spot close to major shops and food outlets

Just spent 5 days in the caravan park. The park is so well run, staff are so helpful and friendly- amenities are spotless. We really enjoyed it and will certainly be back. Thank you for such a pleasant stay.

Great stay at Mandurah Caravan Park. Stayed 3 nights with my grandaughter in a 2 bedroom chalet. Loved the location, pool with slide ,fantastic BBQ facilities and playground. Chalet well stocked with kitchen supplies, nice linen , towels etc.Ceiling fan in main room which was a blessing as it was really hot weather and aircon in kitchen.  Park grounds were really clean, bins everywhere for recycling etc too. Staff were both helpful and friendly. Had a lovely stay and look forward to staying again. Thank you.

We stayed in a Powered Site with our Caravan & the staff were so nice & Jim assisted us in & out of our site magnificently. Handy to everything, the amenities were spotless & slab sites with plenty of room for the car.
Magnificent stay

As soon as we entered the park the lush well maintained gardens were very inviting. One of the staff ushered us to our caravan site and guided us in so we were optimally located. Very friendly, professional and personable.. All van sites have turf or synthetic grass beside them which is cooler and better than sand.
Everything about this park is well done: the kids play areas, communal cooking, and amenities including adequate bench and clothes hooks in showers (which you don't always get!) We'll definitely be back. Highly recommend this park.
Great place to stay - good service, very clean caravan park, excellent facilities.

What a great caravan park ! The park is well maintained, clean, and in a great location. The sites are spacious and everything is set up really well for travellers.

A special mention to Jim, who went out of his way to help guide us into our site when we arrived. With a bigger setup, that kind of help is really appreciated and made the whole arrival process easy and stress-free. His friendly attitude and willingness to help really set the tone for our stay.

Great facilities, great atmosphere, and excellent customer service. We’ll definitely stay here again when we’re back in the area.
Fantastic clean
Excellent for families with kids and not to expensive. Lively and good amenities.
All good. Powered site for our motorhome. Clean amenities. Nice lady at reception was helpful and kind.

The room l had was very clean with everything I needed. Staff were very friendly and helpful. The showers and toilets were all very clean. I would definitely stay there again weather it being for work or holidays
Tv reception needs improvement. Office staff recommended a vet for our dog which was excellent
Handy location relaxed Bali vibe everything you could need for a caravan park modern clean amenities and camp kitchen 😍
Beautiful place, well kept gardens, lovely clean amenities, but shower heads need some attention.

Caravan park was very clean, neat and tidy. Bins for every site and fabulous water pressure. Having the gentleman help us to back in was fabulous. A great stay. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Swimming pool was lovely and inviting. Lots of things for kids to do. Highly recommend this park.
The caravan park was fantastic. Pool was cool and well kept. The sites were a great size and plenty of toilets and kitchens. Staff were amazing. They help direct you into your caravan site.
Great caravan park, big sites great pool and friendly and helpfull staff,will be back
Beautifully presented, great facilities, exceptionally clean, generous very large sites and lovely friendly staff. Really impressive!
Another great stay at MCTP. Very convenient location but seems a million miles from anywhere. The grounds are in fabulous condition

I’m 100% going back there and I would recommend others to go there as well the staff are Orsum and the park it self very clean quiet the people we meet were freindly absolutely loved it and it’s far enough out of town from the hussel of city life but close enough too spud shed and major shopping centre too stock up on supplies see you all again soon stay safe

A really great family campsite.  Lovely staff. Enjoyed the food trucks and entertainment.  My grandchildren loved the pool
And playground. We’ll definitely be back next year.

The staff and grounds people have all gone out of their way to help you with whatever’s required .
It’s a really nice park and the grounds and facilities are great
Enjoyed a fantastic weekend relaxing by the pool, kids loved the water slide. Great food trucks

It was our first time staying here and we were very  impressed!
Very friendly and helpful staff, felt like being apart of the family ☺️excellent amenities from hot shower, great camp kitchens fully equipped laundry, kids entertainment and a well maintained pool to cool off in!
Everything was spotless and maintained. We will definitely be back, thank you for a relaxing stay ☺️
Wow just wow never been at a park with such helpful staff. This park is amazing . Well done to owners for staffing a park correctly allowing the staff to help customers ..

We arrived on Friday afternoon. we booked a tent site for ourselves, 2 Adults for 4 nights.  Our Son and grandson joined us for one night on Saturday.
The office staff were most welcoming and the vibe we got was instantly pleasant.  We were shown to our site by ground staff.
the site was grassy and it was a pleasure not to have to place a ground sheet under our gazebo. Feeling the grass under our feet was very pleasant.
the site was shady.
The Pool, pool slide and bouncy pillow were a big hit with our grandson.
the facilities were dated but clean and well maintained.
This was a most pleasant stay.

Stayed in 2 bedroom chalet. Great air conditioning. Supplied with kettle, 4 slice toaster, pots 'n' pans, (elec fry pan too). Water jug in fridge. Soaps, hair prod's. I queen bed, 2 double bunks. Smart TV. 6 x plates, bowls etc, incl cutlery and cooking accessories. Very clean and comfortable. All linen, towels etc.

I was looking forward to taking a dip in the pool after a long hot day. Got there at 6:02pm and it was shut. The sign said open during daylight hours and also said shuts at 6pm. Being summer there was an hour an a half left of daylight. I mentioned it to the worker in the pool section and he was abrasive and rude. I would have overlooked the disappointment of no pool access, but with the workers attitude towards me about it was argumentative. You should consider changing the sign to properly reflect the actual pool access hours, and possibly provide training to staff that require assistance in basic patron communication.
Apart from a very small bathroom basin the cabin we had was excellent

Stayed on a powered caravan site for 3 nights. The staff are very friendly, they meet you and take you to your site and guide you while reversing your van. The park is well maintained, shared facilities cleaned everyday. Could not fault the park.
Caravan park well kept & clean.  Staff friendly. When we booked we ensured my friends & I had sights together, however when we got there I was separated from them.  Disappointing.

We had our own camping trailer which is why I haven't rated the rooms , but the park was great, good size, good park, nice and clean, great pool, good facilities and super nice staff . Can't wait to re book and go back again !

Clean and tidy, care for all residents by owners reminding parents to keep the children off the park roads after dark so all were safe.  The caravan sites were roomy and level with plenty of tree canopy. Just a wonderful 4  days.
Very nice loved it wanted to stay longer 🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷
Can't fault this kid and pet friendly park.
Your facility and staff are extremely cordial and professional, I appreciate your flexibility in accommodating us and fitting us in, in short notice. Our site was perfect. Thankyou once again.

You have a ripper park ,clean,friendly staff,we felt like we were miles away from anywhere ,thanks guys we stayed 4 nights and will be back ,cheers Craig ,Jos and of corse Coco & Andre our little 12 year old yap yaps.

Mandurah Caravan and Tourist Park is amazing. The grounds are stunning, the amenities are spotless, and the park is quiet and very family-friendly and dog friendly. It’s such an easy and relaxing getaway. A big shoutout to the friendly young staff member who helped direct us when we arrived—so welcoming and helpful. We’ll definitely be back!

Brilliant Caravan Park- friendly, welcoming and cheerful staff always willing to assist people. Neat, tidy areas, food vans and coffee van were excellent. Would definitely stay again if back in Mandurah

Highly recommend this beautiful spot close to the river. The team are very friendly + welcoming. The grounds are very well maintained, the pool + pool area are lovely. Very peaceful + a great spot to have a great time away.

Wow. I was not expecting much from this caravan park. But I was pleasantly surprised. Helen at the reception went above and beyond from the moment I called to see if there was a powered site. The amenities are clean and the grounds immaculate. I did not feel like I was In Mamdurah at all. Will be back 100 percent.

Our 1st Maiden voyage in our new van. We decided to stay at this lovely park. Beautiful little park, very clean amenities, rubbish bins at each site, excellent communication via text messages throughout our stay updating on things happening around the park.  Very impressive and will definitely be returning.  Thank you for making our 1st caravan stay a lovely one.
Absolutely brilliant park, tremendously friendly and welcoming staff- nothing was any trouble, always willing to have a chat and help with any problems/issues. Very well maintained park

I stayed for 2 nights at a powered tent site. Great place to stay. Clean facilties, fiendly staff and a quiet location. They went out of their way to accomodate my needs. Cannot stress how good this place is. Thanks guys, much appreciated.

excellent caravan park, goes down as one of are top favourites.
will be back soon
Fantastic stay

Was very disappointed that pool was not working
I would have thought that you would have a back up pump if things failed rather than having to get one in
Great that you offered free pool entry but still not we wanted as we only book for the pool use for our grandkids
Will have to reconsider for future bookings unfortunately

We always love our stay at Mandurah holiday tourist park.

However this weekend the pool pump broke and wasn’t able to be fixed due to being a long weekend. Which meant some very disappointed kids. It was nice they offered to reimburse for Mandurah pool, but I think a discount for the stay would have been better.

Also, for long weekends/school holidays, and especially when the pool is broken, just have the lawn games out all the time bit just the weekend.

Toilets very clean, great amenities and camp kitchen.

My Family's favorite park.
Kids love the pool and peddle kart
The grounds and facilities are always clean and tidy.
The staff are all lovely.

This camping is a realy nice surprise! Very friendly staff, clean toilet, showers and campkitchen. The swimmingpool was great with 38C outside 🤩😀. Thanks for the nice stay, recommended also for familys with kids and dogs. Next time when we are in Australia and around we see you again.

Beautiful place to stay for a getaway. We have camped here twice now and both times, it was wonderful and relaxing. The pool is refreshing. The camp kitchen is fine but could maybe use some deeper sinks/basins for water collection, as a bit awkward trying to fill big water bottles (5lt +). Would also be nice if there were some park benches scattered throughout the camping ground, as although we have our own chairs, its still nice to just stroll and maybe sit under some random tree somewhere, to take full advantage of the shade and beautiful breezes. And especially some benches around and in the playground area, so us parents have somewhere to watch our kids from without having to just stand there as that's all you can do at the moment. Would also be cool if the open/close hours for the pool could be moved to sunrise to sunset, like most other caravan parks so we can take full advantage of this beautiful, hot summer sun.
Other than these few suggestions, we had a lovely time, both times.
And thank goodness for the beautiful trees for providing us with much needed shade during these peak season temperatures!!
Great Park, friendly staff, great owners and its clean and tidy. Ablutions are great too. We will be back 🍻
Great large sites, close to main shopping centre and restaurants,  excellent location. Ensuite sites have been renovated and are very clean with a nice shower.

Stayed in a one bedroom chalet. Was worth it! Less than a hotel price, yet has a kitchenette(big fridge,freezer, cutlery etc everything you need), microwave, powerful a/c. 2 big chairs (recliner), and importantly a comfortable big bed. Was very clean. The reception staff very polite & friendly! And the whole Park was a great place. Big public toilets (clean) and bbq facilities, pool etc. better than staying at a hotel. Grounds people keeping it clean too. A well maintained place. They had coffee and food vans and live entertainment was right near my cabin! Was great! Would definitely stay here again!!

We booked a powered tent site. Plenty of trees for shade and toilets & showers were opposite which was handy.
Great spot, with plenty of places to visit and explore. Will definitely stay again.

Wonderful caravan park we stayed 3 months and staff and management could not have been more helpful. The park is so professionally run and supervised,kids here have a ball with all the activities . We travelled around Australia and found this to be one of if not the best
Can recommend it to all travellers.

A relaxing, family friendly place to stay. Just unfortunate that the park had plumbing problems, although they were quickly sorted.
Cabins are very clean and comfortable. Friendly office staff. Pool was a big hit with kids of all ages, as were the go karts.
We were a caravan great site next to the toilet block & camp kitchen. Great for kids & staff were very helpful & friendly.
Internet connection is very bad , they should advertise clearly limited availability of Internet, very less activities for kids . Are of improvement. Service is okay, rooms are clean.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. We rented a pet-friendly site. Facilities were clean, staff are helpful and friendly. Beautiful pool and jumping pillow for kids to enjoy. Close to mall and spudshed. We will definitely be back in future. Thank you for making our stay pleasant and enjoyable.

Great playground, great pool and pool slide… the kids loved it! Excellent facilities… and they have lots of staff who are always tidying, cleaning or raking…. Quiet night and kid friendly days.. 10 out of 10

Could be a nice park if it was managed better during school holidays. Out of control groups of kids of all ages on e-scooters, bikes and carts all through the park. Riding through other people’s  sites between vehicles and vans. No parents in sight. Worse in the evenings as kids fast and mostly with no lights. It’s an adventure walking to the ablution blocks in the evening with scooters and bikes flying around on the dark. Won’t be back during school holidays.

Our second stay at MCTP, and the park was clean, gardens are beautiful, sites are well
maintained and staff are friendly and helpful. We had a relaxing and enjoyable week, and will definitely be back again ❤️

We only had one night on a powered caravan site which had lots of room. Very friendly & helpful staff. Facilities very clean and maintained. Happy with our stay. Lots of families with children everywhere (school holidays) which was lovely to see kids outdoors having fun. Short drive to shops.
Our family had a powered site for a week and it was amazing. plenty of shade, staff always on hand, clean amenities. it was great and we will definitely be back
One of the best parks , and friendiest team 😀

Great location, Friendly staff very clean and tidy facilities.
Well organized activities with food vans
Lovely park lots to do for kids and pool area is great The staff are all friendly and helpfull.Always clean and tidy
The staff are all very friendly and the grounds are kept beautiful. The self contained chalet has everything you need for a short stay.
Wonderful 8 days spent camping here.  Staff very helpful. Good clean amenities
We stayed in a 2 bedroom self contained unit with outdoor unsuited. Both very new and kept very clean. We would definitely stay here again.
Loved it. Will be returning
Staff very helpful and friendly dogs welcomed and amenities were spotless . Will go again for sure we all had a great time .

We had an amazing week long stay over Christmas.  Our caravan sites was well kept, with spotlessly clean ensuite.  The kids loved the pool and waterslide and the bouncy pillow.  Daily coffee can and food trucks at the weekend were great too!  Can't wait to go back again!
Awesome place clean tidy and the staff are amazing 👍
We had a great stay at this caravan park. The park was clean, well maintained, and the staff were very friendly and welcoming. We would definitely stay here again

We had a wonderful experience. In particular Helen in the office was very professional & accomodating to our needs.
It is well appointed for the kids enjoyment.
All the ground staff give professional service guiding larger vans into the sites. Really all staff were very friendly & always had time to assist or have a chat.
The bathrooms were always clean & tidy. The gardens were well maintained too.
We are full time travellers & honestly rate this in our top 10 parks. The only down fall is the trees. Great for shade but annoying with foliage & bird droppings.
However we will definitely stay again.
It was one of our best stays

Great park, easy check-in, assistance to reverse in was wonderful, very clean amenities, we were on a site which was huge, with a double slab and fake grass for our vehicle, staff present around the park and consistently seen managing peeps riding e-scooters etc, couldn't ask for more.

We absolutely have loved our stay at Mandurah Caravan & Tourist Park. We have stayed here twice now and both times have been great. The help you get to reverse onto your sites is unmatched - those men are legends! The pool is amazing and so refreshing on a hot day. The kids love the slide and the playground. The tree's around the park provide you with nice shade. Coffee cart on weekends, food trucks and kids activities in the holidays. 10 mins to the Foreshore and 5 mins to the Forum. It is definitely a place we would recommend and come back to when in Mandurah. The only thing I think needs to be considered is extending the opening hours of the pool and playground in the summer months. The sun is still up and blaring at 6pm so having access to the pool would be great and for the kids to continue burning off some energy at the playground before it gets dark.
Beautiful place and staff couldn't do enough for you.  Amazing facilities and very clean and tidy. Cant wait to go back

We stayed 4 nights on a powered site.we were guided to our site and helped to get van onto site which always helps. The site had nice big concrete slab and grassed area.we were provided with our own rubbish bin. Amenities were clean and modern. It was hot but found the pool great to cool off in the afternoon. Shops galore only 5 minutes down the road. Easy to get in and out of caravan park onto dual road. Ice available only $5 a large bag. reception give me local guide books and advice.was not cramped like park we came from in Busselton. Food van on site Saturday and kids activities. Best was staff were very talkative and friendly.

Great park with friendly and helpful staff. Was fully booked and I get why. All patrons were friendly, no riff raff, super clean amenities. Kids loved it. Wife loved it.
We're new to caravanning, so will book again soon as possible. Happy holidaying.

We had a caravan park was nice but the site was all concrete there was some grass nearby . The staff were lovely from reception , grounds people and the cleaners.close to Mandurah city and also Pinjarra which is well worth a visit. Great pool lovely and clean.
I have given this 2 stars only because of the mosquito problem which was horrendous you can’t be outside after dark they swarm in when you open a door and will bite you relentlessly. Because of this much as we loved the area we will not be back for a long time.

We’ve just wrapped up our stay at Mandurah Caravan and Tourist Park, and honestly, it was incredible. The park itself is clean, well-kept and super family-friendly — but the real standout of our entire stay was Shahar.

From the moment we arrived, Shahar went above and beyond. Nothing was ever too hard, every question was met with a smile, and he made us feel genuinely welcome. You can tell he takes so much pride in the park and truly cares about the guests who come through. Little things — the friendly chats, the helpful tips, the way he’s always around making sure everything runs smoothly — made such a massive difference to our stay.

If you’re looking for a place in Mandurah that feels relaxed, safe, and full of heart, this is it. And if you’re lucky enough to cross paths with Shahar, you’ll understand exactly why we’ll be recommending this park to everyone we know.

Highly, highly recommend!

We had our caravan and two dogs.The place is always kept nice and clean. The caretakers do an amazing job at keeping the grounds clean. The bathrooms and kitchen area always clean Nothing to fault at this place.
Great caravan park with pool and waterslide.  Escorted to our site, plenty of amenities and nice big sites.  Had very enjoyable  time there.
Beautiful family park. Amenities well cared for. Would stay again.

4 months of travelling with the family and can honestly say that the service and features at this park were the best. Office Girls were awesome and the 2 guys that took up to our caravan park spot directed me back without any arguments! A+++ Platinum service - Well done. Pool & amenities were perfect.
Very clean and tidy facilities. Close to everything. Had a great weekend with friends (recidivists)  and family (newbies, like us).

We’ve just wrapped up an amazing week at the Mandurah Caravan Park and it honestly blew us away. It’s incredibly dog-friendly and perfectly designed for families, with a great pool, a huge bouncy pillow, a fun playground, and even a kids’ activity over the weekend that our little one absolutely loved.

Saturday’s food truck served proper French crepes — delicious, generous, and affordable — and the weekend coffee cart was exactly what every parent dreams of in the morning.

But what truly sets this place apart is the staff. They are on the ball all the time — warm, attentive, genuinely kind, and so proactive. You can feel how much pride they take in the park. From helping out with the smallest questions to keeping everything spotless and running smoothly, they go above and beyond in a way you don’t see often. They’re the heart of the whole experience.

The park itself is the cleanest caravan park we’ve ever stayed in — absolutely immaculate.

Couldn’t recommend it more. We’ll definitely be back!

Great stay, staff welcoming and helpful. Guidance into our site by staff was very welcome. Lovely big sites, close to Mandurah and shopping centre. Food truck on weekend. Amenities spotless. Very well maintained park.

We stayed in a cabin for the weekend. Checking in was very easy and the girls in the office were lovely. The cabin was so clean and has everything you could need and want for a relaxing stay.
The coffee cart in the mornings on Saturday and Sunday was also great and the operators were so lovely.
Will be staying there again in the near future and would highly recommend it.
***** 5 stars all round.

Ive stayed at this park a few times. In powered sites and cabins. The staff are friendly and informative and go out of their way to make your stay as pleasant as possible. They have kids activities that parents need to book. Depending on the month you stay theres food van. Lovely pool area and a shop thats filled with lots of merchandise and goodies.

Accommodation was clean & comfortable.
Kitchen could be a little better appointed. No serving platters or bowls, blunt kitchen knives & it would be great if a coffee pod machine was supplied.
We did receive a text at 10.30am notifying us of tree lopping. Trouble is the work started at 7am. As well as building site noise that started at 6.30am. A bit of a rude awakening when you're on holidays.
Pool area was lovely.
We would stay there again but not in the same accommodation (expensive for what it is). We'd bring out caravans next time as that part of the park looks lovely.
Lots for kids to do.
Had a wonderful stay. Clean tidy and well maintained.

Right from the time we got there the staff were incredible. (Chakka). I hope that's how you spell his name. He was on the ball and assisted us to park the van. Asked if we needed a hand to set up the van. Very friendly. Our van site was in a nice spot. The caravan park is so close to everything. Only thing wrong was mosquito's. But it's that time of the year. We'll be back. Very nice caravan park will everything you need.
We just had a pitch for a swag for the night. But it was very well kept. Toilets were lovely and clean, staff and guests were friendly. And coffee van on-site in the morning!
Bathroom clean sites were A nice size
It's ace 👌

What a great park, well kept, clean ablutions and great very helpful staff.
Thanks for a great visit. Definitely will be back sometime.
We did book a particular site for various reasons and was told it was available, but on arrival we had been moved, I know and appreciate that any site is not 100% guaranteed but a phone call beforehand to let us know would have been nice. Okay guys, I'm not one of those keyboard warriors that post reviews because I have nothing else going on in my life unless I really like a place I have visited or really despised it. Mandurah Caravan and Tourist Park fell in the first category for me and my family this being our 2nd stay here this year to catch up with the grandkids. Firstly, the sites, we were impressed with the size of the site we are given. Plenty of room for caravan annex and even space to park the car off road making it safe for children to meander around the caravan park without the risk of popping out between cars. A big +
The grounds crew go above and beyond in maintaining the lawns and gardens giving visitors a pleasant tropical retreat feel and a quick shout out to Jim for his extra efforts on our site during our stay. Nothing is any trouble for the staff and I found them very approachable and eager to please. On this particular occasion we stayed 25 nights on an ensuite site for privacy and convenience. I found that during the week the park is relatively quiet compared to the weekend when the family travellers come to make their own memories. The sounds of children's laughter fills the air as they experience time away from their screens enjoying the many activities Mandurah Caravan and Tourist Park have available like the secured playground with jumping pillow, the gorgeous resort style heated swimming pool with its own waterslide which the grandkids absolutely loved and the pedal bikes which were available to hire. Staff also provided lawn games like chess ect. We really enjoyed the weekend food trucks that they organised also. After all we as parents are on holiday too and being offered that opportunity to not have to cook is a win. I have travelled around this big country of ours for many years and from what I have seen at Mandurah Caravan and Tourist park you have obviously taken interest in what your visitors would like in a  family park and delivered in spades. Keep up the great work guys.

Hope to see you again soon
Jacki A

To provide balanced feedback, the accommodation was of high quality. Instead of a standard cabin, it was a small brick cottage that, while somewhat aged, was tidy, clean, and equipped with a comfortable bed, making it a suitable place to stay. The staff were friendly and professional, so from that point of view, a great place to stay.

However, their entry requirements are oppressive. You are required to sign a park terms and conditions when you book the site. We advised we would be checking in late, and we had friends staying at the park who could pick up the key but were told that wasn’t possible because they required signed terms and conditions for the cabin and a copy of my driver’s licence emailed. After a five-hour flight from Sydney, I was faced with a barrage of messages requiring this additional information. They had my name, phone number, home address, email address, credit card details, and that still wasn’t enough.

In these days of scams, data leaks and identity theft, I think it’s too dangerous to provide an overload of unnecessary information, and I wasn’t prepared to email a copy of my driver’s licence. As I informed the staff at checkout, I have stayed at hundreds of motels and caravan parks, normally all they ask for is a phone number and vehicle registration. The system at Mandurah Caravan & Tourist Park is massively over the top and caused undue stress. I would never choose to stay at Mandurah Caravan & Tourist Park again.

Extremely quiet and beautiful accommodation, our 2 nights was enjoyable.  Heater wasnt that great so a extra blanket could have been useful for this time of year.
We would 100% stay again plus let family and friends know about this gem, far enough away from the city to enjoy your stay.

We had the best weekend stay at the park.  The staff were polite and helpful, and we've never seen a park so clean and tidy.  Great amenities for the kids (cart hire, playground and heated pool).  The cabins were new and very comfortable, will absolutely visit again!!
We had a powered site, lovely people guide you to your site. Park is immaculate sites are perfectly maintained. Amenities so clean. Would definitely stay again
Lovely people, very clean, great pool & very shady! Would definitely stay again
Friends visiting from the East stayed here, they appreciated the hospitality and the service
Very friendly, nothing was too much trouble,  clean and tidy park. Large powered sites. Would stay there again.
Staff was really friendly and helpful! Great camp!
Great location and nice and quiet. Staff took us to our site and assisted parking the van. Amenities were clean and showers were very good. Would definitely stay there again

Very friendly welcome
Shown to our site by a friendly, experienced
Worker. Very clean facilities. Well maintained grounds

We stay here for an extended time during covid in 2020 and returning 5 years later nothing has changed. Wonderful staff,grounds and facilities. Staff work non stop keeping the grounds beautiful.Reception staff are always polite welcoming and very knowledgeable and you are directed and assisted into your site. Concrete slabs for van and annex are very spacious and along side is a generous grassed area for your car. Will always be our go to park  when around Mandurah.

Great caravan park. Very friendly staff. They all work hard all day. The backpackers worked really well. Nice bunch of kids. Amenities clean and really nice too. Central to heaps of shops. You don’t want for anything shop wise in Mandurah. Recommend the park to any/everyone. Well done and thanks

Facilities and staff were fine but price was ridiculous. Charged me $57/night for just me to sleep in my car on a patch of grass. They tried to justify it saying all their sites are powered but you would have needed a 10m+ extension lead to reach the one power outlet that looked to service 5+ tent sites. There needs to be a cheaper option otherwise I'd never stay again.
Awesome Caravan Park. The staff are fantastic always ready to help.

Three vans in all stayed in the park for three days . From the minute we arrived the service began reception was perfect the outside staff guided us to our parking spots and even assisted us to park if required. Jim was particularly helpfull and courteous a real asset. The park was clean and tidy I would highly recommend it to you.
Nice place to stay. Friendly staff. Clean amenities. Good Camp Kitchen.

The Mandurah tourist park is located very close to all of Mandurahs amenities. There is a bus at the front and a great park and ride a few km away . shopping centre and town centre is a 5min drive away. The park and its staff are friendly and helpful . The park amenities are fantastic and clean. Gardens and sites are large and immaculate.
Absolutely perfect for small children! Had a tent site near playground,the birds were so amazing came and fed out of our hands , friendly atmosphere 5 stars
We enjoyed our stay,  area was a little cramped to manoeuvre van into.  Private ensuite was clean it was very relaxing we loved the Balinese area near the pool
Great position to town awesome flat powered sites close to amenities. Great parl

park was clean @ tidy staff friendly no power when we arrived came back on about 4 o'clock staff copped well mozzies were a pain when the sun went down that's life..2 or 3 loud drunks Friday night Saturday night good will recommend to fellow caravaners in our cross Australia trip xxx polly

We had a lovely relaxing stay at Mandurah Caravan & Tourist Park. Helen and Noah were great on checkin and getting us on our site. The amenities are always extremely clean. Each site has their own garbage bin. Whilst we didn’t use the pool, it looked great also. Make sure you go to Mandurah Farmers Market for some amazingly fresh produce. Loved our stay.
Beautiful park and the ground staff were amazing we had a peaceful 2 night stay would def stay again
A great place to stay, very clean and tidy,staff were excellent and very helpful.
Great place to base.  Stayed  on a powered site, clean and large. Amenities very clean.  Staff very friendly and helpful.  Would stay again.

Fantastic park near the Serpentine River and about 15 min drive from the Mandurah Foreshore.
Exceptionally clean facilities, concrete slab for van and annex, great camp kitchen next to the kids playground.   The pool and pool area are both clean and tidy and a great oasis with a coffee and snack vending machine.
From reception you are met by a staff member who will guide you into your site.
Ground staff are extremely friendly and work all day raking, mowing, sweeping and blowing and the results show.
The massive Mandurah Forum shopping centre is only 2km down the road.
Highly recommended.
From the moment we arrived, the staff were friendly and helpful, and the cabin was clean and well set up. You could always find a staff member during the day to help if required.

Excellent service by all staff, assistance in parking was appreciated due to limited space to manoeuvre on the roads. Amenities were very well kept . Just a heads up , when leaving and parked in close proximity to trees , ask for assistance in ensuring that your van is not damaged, anyone can spot for you .
Stayed for a week in our caravan, park is always kept immaculate.
Very tidy caravan park friendly service helpful & reasonably priced considering it is not far out of Perth
Great park caravan sites are spacious amenities spotless and clean. The grounds are maintained beautifully the staff are very friendly. Great place to stay ,well done to all the staff and team
Very impressed with the cleanliness of the park and how beautifully maintained the lawns and gardens are. Great facilities for children too to enjoy their stay.

Lovely caravan park with friendly and helpful staff nothing is too much trouble! Great amenities for children with a heated swimming pool, good playground and for adults a fully equipped camp kitchen & a second BBQ facility area.  Add the food trucks and the entertainment on some weekends it is a perfect getaway! Well maintained grounds and love how sms is sent out at night reminding parents kids should not be on bikes, scooters etc after dark & to be back at their campsites! Just a pity the parents obviously don’t read their messages as some kids still ride around.  We will definitely be back!
We had a great stay here during a weekend away with a large group of friends. Great facilities particularly for kids with the pool, water slide, bouncy pillow and playground.
Great service, very clean, great resources. very helpful & friendly

There is no doubt the staff is doing a great job at maintaining the park. Very well kept and clean bathroom, toilets and spotless kitchens. Thank you for your hard work in taking care of the place so we could have a great stay. 10/10!!!
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay, staff were excellent and very helpful and friendly. Park itself was very good, location perfect for us, we will return. Thankyou all.
Always have the best time here staff are always friendly can’t fault the service here that’s why we keep coming back the past 6 years love it great job everyone  see you all next  Easter 🥰🥰🥰

We absolutely love staying at the Mandurah caravan and tourist park. Amazing service, very well kept grounds and amenities. Kids love the pool and play area.
A couple of things for feedback, the gate to the pool and play ground really need to be soft closing as the constant banging is really annoying.
I know you text parents about the riding after dark, however they still do it with no helmets and it’s very dangerous. I witnessed 4 kids crash the other night.
Very minor things but apart from that we will be back again and regulars from now on.
Thanks for always making our stay so fantastic.

Kids and pets friendly location. Staff are approachable. Clean toilet, BBQ and playground.

Good play to chill and relax while watching your kids jumping the pillow. Remember to ask for a site close to the Jumping Pillow if you have kids.

Only down side is it is a bit far from estuary.

This place has something for everyone. Kids are entertained, swimming pool and chute to play on and a huge playarea. We have puppers and very pleased how welcome they are here most of the staff take time to chat with us and our fur babies.
For us over 18s happy hour with free entertainment is great and to give us ladies a night off from cooking the food fans were great. Don't miss out make sure you consider this venue for your next caravan trip.

Facilities are kept very clean, friendly staff
At busy times pitches are very small with everyone tightly packed in. If you are happy bbq'ing everything you should be fine, but there's only 1 stove top and 1 wash up sink which at busy times makes it tricky in the camp kitchen.
Great family camping experience, we camped over the Easter long weekend and the park was a well organised and friendly experience
Cleanest & friendliest caravan park we have been to. We keep going back for a reason!!! Grandson had a great time on school holidays

Check in was fast and friendly. A great touch was being escorted to our ensuite site and assisting with parking and setting up. Thanks to Noah for making it so easy. Everything was neat and tidy. Very pleased and highly recommend.

Stayed there in our caravan on a powered sites. The staff were brilliant and very helpful. I believe Noah helped us reverse the van into our spot and Nick was absolutely brilliant helping out during our stay and when leaving. Location is great and handy to all the things you need in Mandurah. Will be back for sure when we're in the area.

My two boys and I had a fabulous 4 nights staying in a cabin. Was a perfect set up! The bed, comforter and pillows were so comfy!

The kids loved the pool with the slide. Great size and depth for young families. My boys also loved the bouncy pillow and met new friends everyday! Lovely little knick knacks and ice cream at the office. The dvd's was a bit of a surprise but they had a great selection.

The only negative was not being walking distance to a cafe but not really a big deal. Would come again.
Great Sevice.  Have your own bin , toilets clean and modern and are guided into ur bay by a staff member .Great location close to miniature town and Mandurah
Very clean facilities and pleasant staff

This a place we often come back to as a family. The kids love it. The jumping pillow, the swimming pool, the food truck, etc. It's a family friendly site. The toilet bathroom facilities are good. The staff are also very helpful

Great caravan park. Atmosphere was good. Toilets and showers were clean and tidy.
Sites had their own bin which was handy. Sites were plenty big enough as well. All staff were super friendly and helpfull

We had a great stay here in one of the cabins. We also used the public BBQs and bathrooms occasionally and all facilities were extremely well kept, there were always staff working around the grounds. Staff were really friendly and nothing was too much trouble. The water slide and pool were a big hit with the kids!! Great value for money!

The staff are ao helpful when parking the caravan. Takes the stress out of it.
Whether long term of a weekender this is a great place to stay.

We  had a perfect powered spot for our campervan , close to the amenities and loved the rubbish box right close too. The camp handy man was always busy and helpful . Overall great .. a bit far from the sea but we spent the day exploring ..
Great well maintained park

Stayed here for 2 weeks in our caravan, site was huge, we had our 8 metre van with room slide, our awning was fully out and our Chevy Silverado was beside the van and there was still heaps of room, we used the pool multiple times, your guided into your site by the helpful staff, so if your not a confident person with reversing they will get you in with a smile. Loved staying here, yes the streets are narrow but if you take your time thats the least of your issues, would definitely recommend this park and stay again thanks MTCP staff.

We had a lovely 3 night stay here recently in a hired motorhome.  Site is well organised,  very clean and tidy.  Pitches were generous.  Very relaxed site even though it was busy.  Showers/toilets were spotless.  Would highly recommend this caravan park and hope to return in a few years. Thank you!
Deb & Nige, Wales, UK
Excellent park. Staff were so friendly and helpful. Facilities clean and well maintained. One of the best parks i have stayed in.
Very helpful staff, clean and well maintained, spacious sites. Park wifi inadequate and limited. Maybe time to remove the TV aerials and upgrade wifi. Suggest no parking area adjacent Dump Point
Liked: Great facilities and busy staff making sure everything was up to standards

Recently spent two nights on a campsite and I must say A+ to the grounds staff and the facility in general. Camp site was super easy to park on and very clean. The reception was lovely to deal with and very welcoming. The reception organise ground staff to come out an take you to your site and better yet even assist with guiding ya camper into the site! (Marriage saver right here A++!)
Amenities are clean and well maintained. Kids loved the playground, jumping pillow and swimming pool.

Thank you guys, we will be back again for sure!

We have just left this beautiful  park stayed for 3 an was offer 4th at a discounted price  so stayed the extra night staff are very  helpful guided my husband into our  huge park wish all caravan  parks did this this caravan  park is maintain all the time ,pool is lovely an not far to the main hub thankyou  for having  us 👍

Really very friendly and efficient staff, couldn’t be more helpful. Very nice camp site for campervan. Plenty of space around the van. BBQ and shower / toilet facilities very clean. It’s relatively close to a main road into the town, but we didn’t notice any noise during the night. Lots of birds around the site, and nice swimming pool.

We had a shady powered van site for a couple of nights and wished we could have stayed longer. Reg is a great bloke and guided us in having arrived several hours prior to check in time. The park is well maintained and very clean. We enjoyed our stay.
Great caravan park enjoyed our stay and would stay again. Lost a star as the men’s toilets although kept clean ran out of soap and it wasn’t replaced
Highly recommend this park. Staff are very helpful and lots of shaded areas. Will definitely return!

Fantastic place to stay. Lots of things for kids to do, the pool area is beautiful. Very nice site very tidy and gorgeous grounds. We stayed in a one bedroom chalet it was very comfortable and had everything we needed. Not to far from the town centre.
Great caravan park, very shady and staff are extremely friendly and helpful. Facilities are excellent. We will definitely recommend them and we will be back for sure 👍
Have stayed here before. Nothing is too much trouble close to shops but quiet
Very clean and welcoming caravan park. Good facilities. Husband was especially happy when park manager met him on site to help back us into our site.
Excellent camp-grounds, bathrooms are clean and tidy and facilities are in great shape. We had a great weekend,  thanks
Arrived late… given clear instructions.by a very pleasant staff member and found our large site easily. A very well kept and pretty park. Amenities were excellent, Very clean and well located
Had a really enjoyable stay very friendly and helpful staff

I marked rooms as one star as I did not stay in a room. I stayed in a caravan bay.
The staff are very friendly and helpful.
The caravan bays are a very good size, room for the van, awning and my car side by side.
There was a dedicated grey water dump per four bays.
There is a great looking pool with a large slide, a coffee machine and refreshment machine outside the pool in a covered sitting area.
Wir waren hier mit dem Wohnmobil auf einem geräumigen, ruhigen Stellplatz - nur die Papageien haben morgens und abends spektakelt.

Tv aerial in bedroom had been tampered with. Compensated for inconvenience. Otherwise well serviced and equipped and great location.
Will definitely stay again ithe future.

Uns hat der Campground gut gefallen.
Wir hatten einen Stellplatz mit Strom und eigenem Badezimmer. Badezimmer war gut, Dusche ebenfalls.
Die Camp-Kitchen war i. O.
Die BBQ-Grills schwarz und nur mit Backpapier benutzbar.
Personal sehr freundlich.
WLAN funktioniert mal gut oder eben nicht, wenn zu viele Camper vor Ort.
Am Wochenende ist der Campground sehr voll und damit sehr laut. Viele Einheimische, wenig Reisende.
Lovely clean facilities, lovely staff and great location

We were very happy with Mandurah Caravan Park. On arrival we were directed to our site and assisted with backing into our site which was much appreciated. The park is very clean and tidy with lovely amenities. Staff very friendly and helpful.

First time staying here and we loved it! The staff were all beautiful and accommodating, facility's were clean! Playground and pool were so lovely, especially loved by our two little ones.
We were a little off put by the playground not opening until 9am 😅 especially with needing to entertain some early rising kids - however we were happy enough to jump in the car and take a 15min drive to the city centre for coffee and a playground along the foreshore. Plus spudshed was 2 mins up the road for all of our last minute items we forgot. So perfect location! 🙌

Wow come from Victoria, and this would have to be one of the most well kept parks going ,|So clean amenities wonderfully clean , pool is lovely heated? |The staff so friendly , and helpful |They escort you to your site, which never seen before .|This park in on the Pinjarra hwy 2 mns to Mandurah forum really great place for all families etc , a must if visiting , you won’t go wrong .|Thanks guys for a great stay x |Cheers T& G

Great cabin
Well maintained caravan park
Great place to stay
Staff are always so good and grounds people are always cracking jokes, or even the simple act if saying good morning is very refreshing,  this is our 2nd stay with you guys and we loved it ❤️

I have sent 2 emails and no response from my emails?
Maybe too busy.
Found another place to stay.
Very clean and well maintained park. Nice service. More strict control on bike/scooter/e-scooter riding of kids after dark will be suggested though.
Everything was fantastic, the park was extremely clean and busy. I loved how child friendly it was. The staff were amazing credit to all of you 😀

Great park. Very friendly staff. We were directed by staff to our site where he help direct us into the site. Saved me from being yelled at. Thank you!! Explaining all the
Facilities in the park. The swimming pool was so relaxing on a hot day. Not far from all the shop just a short drive.
Loved our stay.
Very nice park with great facilities. Location is ok.
We had a great public holiday long weekend, loved the food trucks! Our spot was quite small in between trees but Mick was on hand to guide us in! Need a Mick at every campsite 😂

Not very family orientated as pool and playground do not open until 9am and no balls allowed. Theft is high as boom gate is left open permanently. Camp area is a mishmash of sites and cars jammed around the camp kitchen
Excellent Caravan Park close to everything we needed to do. Staff are very friendly and helpful. Facilities are clean and in great condition.

Great reception staff. Very helpful - held a lost card for a visitor to  Mandurah foreshore - until visitor could return from Perth to collect it. Thank you.
Ground staff cheerful and very conscientious about grounds & helping us oldies reverse caravans onto sites - even on drive through
Nice park great clean amenities very tidy grounds swimming pool dump point spud shed next door river not far. bit of a drive to town. Happy with my stay. Nice and quiet of a night.

Brian and I thoroughly enjoyed our time with the park and would highly recommend. We had a lovely room in the chalet. The grounds are very well kept and the staff always very courteous and helpful. Thanks for an enjoyable stay.

Positives: Love this park. Have stayed here several times over the years  Staff are hard working and hospitable. Grounds well kept. Pool delightful. Location great. Awesome park.
Negatives: Due to a large crowd known to each other on sites 59, 60 & more, on 20th and 21st Feb 2025, we were disgusted with the offensive language from both males and females in the group. No thought for their kids or anyone within 20 ft of ear shot. I complained to the office, as had others, but nothing appeared to be done, as the second night of their arrival was worse than the first. Foul, loud language and loud music until 10pm. Despite park rules stating no scooters or skate boards after dark, the very small children of these adults used the roads as a race track untill 10pm. Total disregard for all. Two other couples were also fed up. So dissapointing, as we have enjoyed every stay up until this one.

Assistance right from the start. Big sites.
Very clean and shady. Best in Mandurah.

Had an amazing 9 nights here. Is centrally located to a number of places throughout Mandurah.
Everyone was so helpful and it was fantastic to have Mick on hand to guide us perfectly into our site.
Would highly recommend to everyone 👍
Lovely place! Clean amenities, nice lawn and very helpful staff!! Thanks for a great stay
The site we were allocated was very small and my husband had to fit between 2 trees..the rds are too narrow which makes turning very difficult..than God for the groundsmen.

Nice place to stay , lots of trees & most sites have some shade , and with that comes leaves and dead small branches falling during the windy days . It can be a bit tight for manoeuvring around with your van . Great heated pool , too small on hot days when everyone wants to be in there . The amenities were kept clean & tidy . traffic noise can be a bit noisy at peak times . Sites near the playground do get there share of kids noise . Staff guide you onto site with your van , which works okay most of the time .
Staff great. Very clean .

Lovely clean and tidy caravan park with all the things you would need to have a relaxing stay. The caravan park staff are wonderful. Nothing is too much trouble as they work hard to make your stay enjoyable and relaxing.

Great experience…friendly and eager staff …a little expensive on the week end.
Would definately use again. Thanks
Lovely neat and tidy park. Service was great, we will be back.
Nice clean park , friendly staff ,close to Mandurah train station and foreshore

Nice park.  Very helpful staff.
Beautiful maintain gardens.
Concrete slabs for van and annex.
Ammenities nice and clean all day.
Definarely stay again.
Hi. We are so grateful for having us at your caravan park.  We spent amazing days.  We really enjoyed and recommend your place for everyone who is going pas Mandurah. It's worth it 👌
Great place … clean and friendly
Great park, clean, friendly staff.

Always a great stay at this Park. Friendly staff who accommodate your needs. This is the second time we’ve stay in a cabin and would definitely stay again. After picking up  our caravan from its service, we are now about to experience a stay in the caravan at the park and looking forward to a swim in the great pool.

We had 2 nights in cabin no:2. It was spotlessly clean and well set out with everything we needed...right near the pool and opposite to where food and coffee trucks stop. The pool was great and the staff really pleasant and helpful. Can definitely recommend
Friendly and well staffed. Clean and good facilities . Lovely shady bays just a bit tight but they have a marriage survival aid of a guide that helps you in to the bays . Perfect for young families
Best service help backing caravan in great amenties well kept grounds and friendly staff

Great place to stay and the staff always looking to help you with anything
Big thumbs up to Reg and Donna
It was a very enjoyable time spent with family. Accomodation was clean and well presented. Also staff were very friendly and obliging.

Great place to stay with the family
Pool and playground should be open to 7 in summer to keep the children  happy

Our second stay here with the grandkids and it was just as good as our first. Lovely shaded roomy sites, very clean amenities, fantastic pool and jumping pillow/playground and very friendly staff. We'll be coming back every year with the grandkids, they love it!!

We had the perfect space for our CamperVan! We went with 3 other couples with their caravans and we were all grouped together which was amazing. We had an open space directly behind us with beautiful green grass which was covered with glorious trees for shade and very close to the amenities. Beautiful clean amenities I have to say. The grounds are very well maintained and the things that they had arranged for the Australian Day Campers was very well received by all. The facilities around were great and the swimming pool was glorious. If there was 1 request it would be to have a special time in the pool allocated for adults only weather it be earlier in the day or later in the evening I think that would be well received. The staff were very welcoming and very friendly and nothing was ever too much to ask.
Thanks heaps for the hospitality MCTP. 😊

We had caravan site. Awesome location. Staff, especially Reg were very friendly and helpful. Only problem kids with scooters riding around at night and through our sites. Otherwise would recommend.  Have booked again for next year Australia day.
Thanks Laura
Couldn’t have had a better time. Water slide and the jumping pillow were a favourite with the kids. Very clean chalet/cabin. Very friendly/helpful staff. Will be back!

Another beautiful stay at Mandurah Caravan and Tourist Park for us. We stayed in a two bedroom cabin which was clean and comfortable. The queen bed and bedding were so comfy, it's not often you get a really comfy bed at accommodation so I was pleasantly surprised.

Location is great with spud shed just down the road.
Swimming pool and slide for the kids is nice although the pool did close at 6pm which struck us as a little odd for summer hours, the sun was still high in the sky and it was really hot so the kids would have liked to swim for longer.

Lots of friendly birds came to us on the patio which delighted the kids. Kids loved the jumpy pillow. Staff are lovely and helpful with anything you need.

Only real negative and which isn't the park's fault, is that many people don't have camping or park manners and within 20 minutes of arriving we had multiple people walk through our site, one kid flying through on a bike nearly scraping our vehicle with his handlebars so we had to park the vehicle diagonally across the driveway to discourage this. Again not the park's fault, but maybe a sign on entry asking people not to walk through sites is needed.

Will definitely stay again and recommend this place to others.
Stayed at power site, nice shade！but so many mozzies….

We recently booked a 4 night stay at this caravan park and absolutely loved it!! It’s such a good caravan park for the kids with an awesome jump pillow and playground as well as a fantastic pool with a slide.  Staff are really friendly as well as the birds as you will see in my photos. We will definitely be back soon!

Stayed on a powered campsite for 5 nights. Great location and fab pool. Staff were friendly but constantly gardening- which meant not much relaxation over the noise.

Also please put a toilet next to the pool - quite a walk away from the pool area to the facilities - lots of kids just peeing in the pool or “bush wees” because no one wants to walk all that way.
Lovely caravan park enjoyed our stay would go back

Staff were polite and helpful.  We were in 2 tent sites next to the bouncy pillow. Great location as children can be easily supervised. Also next to very clean camp kitchen. Pool, a short walk away, was FANTASTIC.  Had a small slide which the children thoroughly enjoyed. Coffee machine at the pool has great coffee.  Clean toilets. Overall, a great camp ground.  We will be back. The only bad part was that the mozzies were terrible.
Great caravan park. Surprises you. My kids love it. Clean camp amenities. Everything you can want.

Had a 4 night stay with my adult son and my grandchildren. We all had a wonderful stay. From the coffee and food truck on the weekend, crafts for the kids, great jumping pillow and playground and the kids favourite the waterslide at the pool. Nobody wanted to go home. Thank you

We spent a week here with our daughter and her family. It’s such a great place and convenient to wherever we wanted to go. The place was very clean and the staff were absolutely beautiful. So helpful in helping us park our van and checking we were ok
We will definitely be back
Very friendly and helpful staff, ablutions always cleaned very well. Would happily return again.

We recently spent 2 nights here and really enjoyed our stay. The greatest asset to this park has to be the staff. What a great bunch of people they have running the place. We were very grateful for the gentleman who helped us navigate our way to and into our site. What a legend he was! The gentleman who stopped to say hi to our puppy a couple of times and the lady in the office when we checked in were both very lovely too. The park is well equipped and all amenities were very clean.There is plenty to keep kids occupied that you could easily park up and not leave at all during your stay. The sites are tight, but the assistance they give to help you into your site made it easy to get into. We are first time caravan owners and this was our first trip so the help was very much welcomed. We will definitely be back and have already recommended the park to family and friends.

Had a wonderful stay and have rebooted for Feb Nd long weekend next year.
Owners and staff were fantastic. Highly recommend this place.
All management was super friendly and helpful. Dunnys and shower were spotless. Would highly recommend
Took our caravan away for two nights to get away prior to going back to work, great spot clean facilities and staff very friendly and helpful.

Very well thought out caravan park. From the moment we checked in, we were greeted with smiles at the office.
Groundsman Mick was very helpful navigating us onto our site. We had to borrow a drill bit twice and the groundsmen always came quick and even offered to lend us a hand
the pool slide was an absolute hit with the kids. Amenities were very clean, and I love that the washing machine accepts card!

the staff were excellent regarding safety. On our last night, kids were racing on their scooters and bikes and one of the staff member Donna sent a text message to have the kids back at sites in case of an accident. Really appreciate this as I nearly got ran over by a kid that night whilst walking my dog! So that was really appreciated!

Only downside was the opening hours of the playground playground. Lots of kids are up early (7-ish) at the park, and the 9am opening time is a tad late for the kids!

We love this park. Staff so friendly and helpful. Relaxing and the amenities are very clean and in good order.
The pool is a bit small for the amount of guests. We went to use it a couple of times and it was overflowing with people. It was school holidays though.
What s great Park, clean, friendly, great service so well organised, would highly recommend we had the best time and would definitely visit again.

Beautifully well kept
Great size sites, where you are not sitting on top of your neighbours and with plenty of room still for your car also.
Awesome park for young families

We were made feel so welcome from the minute we arrived. We were guided to our site, and we had a small water problem which management helped to solve. Procedures were explained and our stay was great.
Edited review due to changes. Great staff, great clean park and lovely amenities.

We stayed for a month in December 2024.
You won't find a better maintained caravan park. Beautiful big trees with lots of local bird life, shady sites, friendly office and grounds staff.
The pool is great in all weather!

This was our 3rd time here.
Entertainment for grand final weekend was fantastic.
All the kids enjoyed them selves.
The camp kitchens & ablution blocks are very clean & quite modern .
We will book again definitely 😃

Well we are back again for a week over Xmas.
Love this place .
Great vibes & always happy campers.
We only stayed 1 night but will be back, the room was super clean and very comfortable. The grounds, pool everything looked so lovely and the staff were very helpful and friendly 😊
Our second stay at this lovely park & cannot fault it.  Large shady sites, great clean amenities & wonderful friendly & helpful staff.  Can’t ask for anything better.
Friendly and welcoming staff, quiet and large sites and a wonderful park to stay at. Best park to stay at in Mandurah. Dogs welcome

We stayed same weekend last year and this year to go crabbing. We book a caravan spot with a private ensuite. The caravan park is lovely, nice and clean, spacious and the pool is a nice bonus. It also has a clean camp kitchen with crab Pot so you don't have to do it at your camping spot (smelly!).
Great place, look forward to visiting again.
Staff, facilities, location - all just awesome for a low key, chill, fun filled break.  Love it here.
